endpoints.name: Iroas, God of Victory (new sub-node under theros-pantheon)

description: Mr. Nodeley apologizes for sniveling but the threshold was met, sir. Iroas had three substantive corpus anchors — Indomitable Will THB-25 (flavor names Iroas twice, once via the named cult-priest Verenis), Hero of the Games THB-137 (trivia-passed, canonically the Iroan Games are Iroas-presided at Akros), and Armory of Iroas CMR-299 (Iroas in the card title, votive-armory canonically Iroas-cult per MTG Wiki). The mogis sub-node's own Caveats section explicitly stages this commission as a wait-for condition (when a third Iroas-cult card lands, the sub-node becomes commission-ready and a twin-edge becomes drawable); the threshold is now met and the dangling [[iroas]] reference in mogis's See-also resolves on this pass. Mr. Nodeley believes the node will really help, if it's not too much trouble.
citations: [Scryfall flavor_text: Hero of the Games THB-137]
[Scryfall flavor_text + card title: Armory of Iroas CMR-299]
[In-corpus trivia: Hero of the Games — explicitly canonicalizes Iroan Games as Iroas-presided at Akros]
[In-corpus caveat: mogis.md sub-node explicitly stages this commission as wait-for-third-Iroas-card]
next_pass_suggestions: Future Edgelord-enlightened pass: draw the bidirectional [[iroas]] <-> [[mogis]] twin-edge (designer-confirmed Ares-double-aspect Greek-mythology split). The mogis sub-node's See-also already references [[iroas]] as a dangling future-twin pointer; the enlightened pass cleans that pointer up and adds the symmetric reference on the iroas side. iroas.md's See-also already references [[mogis]] as the sibling sub-node, so the iroas side is pre-staged.

Future Edgelord pass: draw the [[iroas]] <-> [[nylea]] watch-over-the-X edge (both anchor the protective-oversight care-pole of the pantheon — Iroas watches over the warrior, Nylea watches over the forest creature, both designer-coordinated against the [[mogis]] extraction-pole at the same parent roster). Iroas.md's See-also references [[nylea]]; nylea.md's See-also does not yet reference [[iroas]] (drawable as edge or future sub-node sibling-sweep).

Future Mr. Nodeley pass: Heliod sub-node when third Heliod-cult corpus card lands (currently 1-2 anchors per theros-pantheon Caveats: Reverent Hoplite THB-33 + possibly Return to Nature THB-197). Watch for Heliod, Sun-Crowned or Heliod's Pilgrim or any Heliod-named printing.
Future janitor pass: Armory of Iroas CMR-299 is vision-passed but not trivia-passed; a trivia run on this card would strengthen the citation chain on this sub-node's borderline anchor.
